originalTitle: Stock Market Today, June 26: Keel Infrastructure Rises as Convertible Financing Backs AI Data Center Push
summary: Keel Infrastructure’s new financing gives its AI data-center pivot more flexibility, with investors watching whether power-secured sites can turn into signed leases and clearer project economics.
content: Keel Infrastructure’s new financing gives its AI data-center pivot more flexibility, with investors watching whether power-secured sites can turn into signed leases and clearer project economics.
chineseTitle: 今日股市，6 月 26 日：随着可转换融资支持 AI 数据中心的发展，龙骨基础设施崛起
chineseSummary: Keel基础设施的新融资为其人工智能数据中心枢纽提供了更大的灵活性，投资者正在关注有电力保障的场地是否可以转化为已签署的租赁合同和更清晰的项目经济效益。
chineseContent: Keel基础设施的新融资为其人工智能数据中心枢纽提供了更大的灵活性，投资者正在关注有电力保障的场地是否可以转化为已签署的租赁合同和更清晰的项目经济效益。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
